---
title: "Mary Coleridge Lady"
---

## Mary Coleridge Lady

**Dates:** (1788-1874)

**Maiden name:** (Buchanan)

### Description

wife of Sir John Taylor Coleridge

### Biography

She married (7 Aug 1818)  Sir John Taylor Coleridge [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from Sept 15th [1868]
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
